text: If the State is interested in protecting fetal life after viability, the State may go so far as to prescribe abortion during that period, except when preserving the life or health of the mother is necessary.
original_text: " If the State is interested in protecting fetal life after viability , it may go so far as to pro-scribe abortion during that period , except when it is necessary to preserve the life or health of the mother . "
Not all abortions are unjustified according to this argument : abortion would be justified if the same justification could be applied to killing an adult human .

text: Abortion would be justified if the same justification could be applied to killing an adult human.
original_text: Not all abortions are unjustified according to this argument : abortion would be justified if the same justification could be applied to killing an adult human .

text: The National Cancer Institute, the American Cancer Society, and the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists refute the claim that abortion increases the probability of developing breast cancer.
original_text: The National Cancer Institute ( NCI ) , the American Cancer Society ( ACS ) , and the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists all refuted the claim that abortion can lead to a higher probability of developing breast cancer .

text: They also ruled that the word "person" in the Constitution did not include a fetus.
original_text: They also ruled that the word " person " in the Constitution did not include a fetus .

text: Teenagers who become mothers have grim prospects for the future.
original_text: Teenagers who become mothers have grim prospects for the future .

text: Planned children often have better life prospects because caregivers are better prepared to support the child physically, emotionally, and financially.
original_text: Planned children often have better life prospects because caregivers are better prepared to support the child physically , emotionally , and financially .

text: It is immoral to kill an unborn child for convenience.
original_text: It is immoral to kill an unborn child for convenience .

text: Technology has clearly helped define how people think about a fetus as a full, breathing human being.
original_text: More recently , Kate Michelman , long-time president of NARAL Pro-Choice America , acknowledged that " technology has clearly helped to define how people think about a fetus as a full , breathing human being . "

text: If women are unprepared to care for their children, women should at least put their children up for adoption.
original_text: If women are unprepared to care for their children , they should at least put them up for adoption .

text: When an abortion is performed on a 12-week-old fetus, the child's mouth is open in a silent scream as seen in an ultrasound image.
original_text: " Bernard N. Nathanson , MD , the late abortion doctor who renounced his earlier work and became a pro-life activist , stated that when an abortion is performed on a 12-week-old fetus , " We see [ in an ultrasound image ] the child ’s mouth open in a silent scream ... This is the silent scream of a child threatened imminently with extinction .

text: The silent scream observed in the ultrasound image is the silent scream of a child threatened imminently with extinction.
original_text: " Bernard N. text: Killing an adult human being is wrong because killing an adult human being deprives the victim of a future like ours—a future containing highly valuable or desirable experiences, activities, projects, and enjoyments.
original_text: On this account , killing an adult human being is wrong because it deprives the victim of a future like ours — a future containing highly valuable or desirable experiences , activities , projects , and enjoyments .

text: Unplugging and thereby causing the death of a person who is using one's kidneys would be permissible.
original_text: It is argued that just as it would be permissible to " unplug " and thereby cause the death of the person who is using one 's kidneys , so it is permissible to abort the fetus ( who similarly , it is said , has no right to use one 's body 's life-support functions against one 's will ) .

text: Aborting the fetus is permissible because the fetus similarly has no right to use one's body's life-support functions against one's will.
original_text: It is argued that just as it would be permissible to " unplug " and thereby cause the death of the person who is using one 's kidneys , so it is permissible to abort the fetus ( who similarly , it is said , has no right to use one 's body 's life-support functions against one 's will ) .

text: Susan B. Anthony and Elizabeth Cady Stanton spoke out against abortion.
original_text: Chief among them were Susan B. Anthony and Elizabeth Cady Stanton , who not only led the fight for the right of women to own property , to vote , and obtain equal education , but also spoke out against abortion .
